General.Name: Inke Ltd
General.Description: Inkeverse Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates mobile live streaming platforms in the People's Republic of China. The company's products include entertainment platforms comprising of Inke App and Duiyuan App. It is involved in online advertising, value-added telecommunication, internet cultural, online audio and video program, and talent agency services. In addition, the company offers supporting services for the operation of mobile livestreaming platforms. The company was formerly known as Inke Limited and changed its name to Inkeverse Group Limited in June 2022. Inkeverse Group Limited was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

2.Name: Mr. Liming  Xiao
2.Title: Joint Company Secretary & VP of Finance
